header: Two commands. That's the whole installation.
code:
# Require the package (TYPO3 14.3+, PHP 8.3+) — free, GPL-2.0, no license key
composer require webconsulting/desiderio

# Seed the full styleguide: 244 elements across 10 groups,
# each chapter page running its own theme preset
vendor/bin/typo3 desiderio:styleguide:seed

# Optional: a lean starter page tree instead
vendor/bin/typo3 desiderio:starter:seed
